framework.name: OAuth Tokens Lose Lineage by Hop 3
framework.description: By the third delegation hop, standard OAuth tokens have no cryptographic link to the initiating agent or user. This is the specific failure mode for multi-hop token chains.
framework.raw_quote: By the third delegation hop, there is no cryptographic link to the initiating agent or user.

source.title: Control the Chain, Secure the System: Fixing AI Agent Delegation
